bug.description: redundant computation performing the same calculation multiple times unnecessarily

prompt:
There is a redundant computation performing the same calculation multiple times unnecessarily downstream of function decode_ul_mac_sub_pdu_header in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/gNB_scheduler_ulsch.c:281.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
